summary: BuildTrack MVP testing completed successfully. Backend API tests (18 passed, 3 skipped due to no projects in DB), Frontend E2E tests (10 passed). All core features working: splash screen, onboarding, login, dashboard with charts, navigation.

minor.issue: AI endpoints require existing project in database - some tests skipped

issues: shadow* style props are deprecated - Use boxShadow warning in Expo
Unexpected text node error appearing in Expo logs (minor)

Frontend tested splash screen, onboarding with Peter Martinez photo, login flow, dashboard with charts. Navigation tabs working. No projects in database yet - create some to test AI and reports features fully.
